overall.description: A samurai character runs through an autumn grassland at sunset toward a burning horizon, passing the Ogawa Dojo and bamboo groves before entering a traditional Japanese gate. Cinematic third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland with autumn trees toward burning sunset

agents.ego_description: samurai running steadily through tall grass toward the distant fires and sunset

entered.detail: golden tall grass swaying in the wind covering the ground
dense trees with orange and red autumn foliage
bright orange sun low on horizon with red smoke-filled sky
small wooden footbridge over a narrow water stream
dark smoke rising from distant fires on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The samurai runs through an open field of tall golden grass surrounded by autumn trees, heading toward a dramatic sunset with distant fires and smoke on the horizon. A small wooden bridge crosses a stream in the middle distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: dojo exterior wall and bamboo grove path

events.description: passing alongside the Ogawa Dojo building wall

agents.ego_description: running alongside the wooden dojo wall and through the shaded bamboo path

entered.detail: large traditional wooden dojo building with dark roof tiles
tall dense bamboo stalks lining the path
narrow dirt path winding through the vegetation

segments.scene_description: The character runs alongside the wooden wall of the Ogawa Dojo, transitioning from open grassland into a shaded path lined with dense bamboo groves. The dirt trail winds through the vegetation as the sunset becomes partially obscured by the dojo structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: traditional Japanese gate and courtyard entrance

events.description: entering the large wooden gate into the compound courtyard
emerging from gate shadow into sunlit courtyard with visible villagers

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing through the main gate into the compound courtyard

notable_agents.action: villager in traditional clothing standing near the gate entrance

entered.detail: massive traditional wooden gate with curved roof tiles marking the entrance
tall vertical banners with circular symbols hanging in the courtyard
wooden structures with lit lanterns flanking the entrance path

segments.scene_description: The samurai emerges from the bamboo path to approach a large traditional wooden gate. Passing through the gate reveals a courtyard with hanging banners, traditional buildings with lit lanterns, and villagers standing in the distance. The ground transitions from dirt to stone paving.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an expansive, fire-lit autumn grassland into the structured sanctuary of a traditional Japanese village. It begins with the samurai sprinting through tall golden grass toward a dramatic sunset marked by distant smoke and a small wooden bridge crossing a stream. As the character reaches the Ogawa Dojo, the open vista narrows into a shaded dirt trail that winds through dense, towering bamboo groves. The scene then opens as the samurai emerges from the vegetation to approach a large wooden gate, where the ground shifts from dirt to stone paving. Finally, the camera passes through the gateway to reveal a courtyard filled with hanging banners, lit lanterns, and distant villagers.
